# uapi_unbound_ext (Resource)

Unbound ext config.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uapi_unbound_ext" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the entry is active.
- `ext_line` (List of String) Verbatim lines rendered into unbound_ext.conf, outside the `server:` clause. One entry per line; build whole `forward-zone:`/`view:`/`stub:` clauses by listing them in order.

### Read-Only

- `etag` (String) Opaque ETag of the resource's current state, used for If-Match optimistic concurrency.
- `id` (String) Stable resource id assigned by uapi (a prefixed ULID).
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
